message:
fix(test-utils): handle all WebSocket message data types

- Add normalizeWsPayload() helper to properly decode WebSocket messages
- Support string, ArrayBuffer, typed arrays (Uint8Array), and Blob types
- Fixes test failures when WebSocket messages arrive as binary data
  instead of text strings

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
